title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates building AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK, showing how agents work as loops where a model reasons about tools, selects them, executes them, and repeats. Four agents are built from scratch: single tool, multiple tools with model selection, instrumented with hooks, and a multi-agent orchestrator.
